difficulty.reason: Dense sow, harvest in 2-3 weeks, foolproof, tastes great raw

growth_stages.name: Germination
growth_stages.look_for: Dense carpet of green loops pushing up through the soil

prompt.en: Look! The soil is turning into a green carpet -- so many little shoots!
prompt.da: Se! Jorden bliver til et groent taepp -- saa mange smaa skud!

growth_stages.name: Growth
growth_stages.look_for: Shoots about 5-8cm tall with small tender leaves

prompt.en: How tall are the pea shoots now? Use your finger as a ruler!
prompt.da: Hvor hoeje er aerteskuddene nu? Brug din finger som en lineal!

growth_stages.name: Harvest
growth_stages.look_for: Shoots 10-15cm tall with curly tendrils, ready to cut

prompt.en: Grab a bunch and snip with scissors! Eat them right there -- they taste like sweet peas!
prompt.da: Tag fat i en bunke og klip med saksen! Spis dem med det samme -- de smager af soede aerter!

human_readable.en: Keep moist. Water daily in warm weather.
human_readable.da: Hold fugtig. Vand dagligt i varmt vejr.

harvest.notes: Quick microgreen crop: dense sow, harvest in 2-3 weeks. Zone replaced by sunflowers in Phase 3 (W18).

companion_plants.notes: Short-lived crop, minimal companion interactions. Keep away from alliums.

message.en: Pea shoots need daily water to stay tender!
message.da: Aerteskud har brug for dagligt vand for at holde sig moere!
